caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied up and wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt is seated in a studio setting. She is positioned in front of a professional microphone. In the background, a screen displays the text "ohnson" and a sign that reads "Employees Only". The "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" logo is visible on the screen, along with a smaller caption that says "Boss Talk 101 Logo Guide". Across the sequence, the woman is speaking, with her facial expression shifting from an open-mouthed speaking pose to a slight squint and closed lips as she continues her dialogue. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium shot of the woman from the chest up as she interacts with someone off-screen.
